title: Tovomitopsis guatemaltecana
taxonomy: Tovomitopsis guatemaltecana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant is part of the genus Tovomitopsis, which is a group of plants that are often found in tropical regions. The Clusiaceae family, also known as the Calophylloideae subfamily, includes a wide variety of flowering plants. Tovomitopsis guatemaltecana is native to Guatemala, hence its specific epithet. The classification of Tovomitopsis guatemaltecana is still being studied and updated by botanists.
